message:
fix(core): make commit_epoch infallible and remove EpochNotStaged error

When an inode has no writes at the requested epoch, commit_epoch now
advances visibility to staged_epoch (all available data becomes visible)
instead of returning an error. This is correct because a fence at epoch
N is satisfied when there is nothing to hide — the inode simply doesn't
have data at that epoch. Remove WritebackBarrierError::EpochNotStaged
variant. Update commit_inode to return () instead of Result. Update
all tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
